Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Fathom]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Fathom is a world where war erupted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Fathom is a location surrounded by a cordon.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — Fathom is a major system that the Swarm-Queen might feed on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Captain plans to take the fight to Fathom.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Fathom is the human home world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Fathom is a location where Planetary Security operates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Varic attempted to track Benri to Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — The Captain was born on Fathom six times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Fathom is an important world with populations on every planet in its system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — The call Benri received likely originated from Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Benri intends to return to Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Benri docked in Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Fathom's population lives in twelve sprawling megacities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Fathom is a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Fathom Subline is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — A Subspace warp blooms just outside Fathom’s atmosphere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Fathom is a planet often called the Heart of the Galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Fathom is considered an ancient center of culture and economy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Fathom is currently being attacked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Fathom is a planet where starships were lifting into the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The narrator's side attacked Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Fathom has a Planetary Defense Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Fathom has defenders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — The crew was not invading Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Something happened on Fathom that Benri Vallenar was horrified to learn about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Ortila has family on Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — Solstice's influence is concentrated in Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Gunder does not live on Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Fathom is a World Spirit with an avatar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Fathom is the heart of Solstice's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — The Oracle's base is not on Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 41''' — Fathom is a moon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Fathom is a World Spirit that the planet's World Spirit addressed by name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Fathom has a projection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Fathom is the capital of the Galactic Union and the heart of the galaxy.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
